description: Vulnerability-unapproved fixture. A runtime advisory whose npmSeverity is moderate (and therefore below npm's --audit-level=high blocking threshold) is recorded against a runtime dep, but no matching securityExceptionApprovals entry exists. The validator cannot auto-exempt low/moderate runtime findings; the policy mandates exact advisoryId match between .github/security-exceptions.json AND owner securityExceptionApprovals before such an advisory can be excepted. Without that match the validator emits SECURITY NOT READY: VULN_UNAPPROVED exit 1.

audit.note: npm audit exits 1 because at least one runtime advisory is present at the same level the policy considers high; the policy-exit code is 0 here because npm-audit's high-threshold captured the entry but the exception approval path failed. The validator never auto-excepts runtime advisories without an exact securityExceptionApprovals match.

runtimeAdvisories.title: Synthetic advisory for validator testing only
runtimeAdvisories.rationale: synthetic fixture; no real owner approval asserted
